# M8 Integration Gate Report

**Story:** M8.7 — M8 Integration Gate Test Suite + Manual Smoke Fixture
**Generated by:** @dev (Dex — Builder persona) acting as gate-test executor
**Date:** 2026-04-25
**Verdict:** **PASS**
**Reviewer disposition:** PASS the M8 milestone for v1.5.0 GA tag readiness. The single CONCERN remaining from the M6.7 verdict (cell-registry absolute-path leak — §6.1) was hotfixed during M8.7 closeout per the M6.7 remediation note; the channel-hash invariant is restored and all M8 gate criteria pass automatically. Gate criterion 2 remains documented as a manual smoke test owing to the inherent constraint that a Claude Code interactive session has no headless API; the fixture is reproducible and audit-ready for `@qa` to execute once before milestone declaration.

This is a machine document. Audience: `@qa` (gate sign-off), `@po` (milestone close), `@pm` (v1.5.0 GA tag decision), `@devops` (release tag trigger).

---

**Overall verdict:** **PASS** — All 3 PRD § M8 gate criteria pass. Criterion 2 is split into the automatable structural prerequisite (PASS automatic) and the inherently-manual runtime activation (procedure ready for `@qa`).

## 6. Hotfix Applied During M8.7 Closeout

### M6.7 §6.1 — Cell-registry absolute-path leak (**CLOSED**)

**Problem (from M6.7 gate-report.md §6.1):**
`.kaizen-dvir/dvir/cell-registry.js` `_personaRelPath()` (lines 683-690) embedded the absolute filesystem path of each agent persona into the body of every generated `.claude/commands/Kaizen/Yotzer*.md` skill file. Two installs of the same package landed under different `os.tmpdir()` roots, so the absolute path string differed across invocations — breaking byte-equality between the two distribution channels (`tests/m6/test-channel-github-packages.js` + `tests/m6/test-channel-npx-github.js`).

**Fix applied in M8.7:**
Replaced the absolute-path body with a POSIX-relative path under `cellRoot` (e.g., `agents/chief.md`). The body remains informational (markdown body, not tooling-consumed); the expert resolves it relative to the cell that owns the skill, which is implicit in the `/Kaizen:Yotzer` prefix and the documented L2 cell layout.

**File changed:** `.kaizen-dvir/dvir/cell-registry.js` (function `_personaRelPath`).

**Tests affected:**
- 2 assertions adjusted in `tests/m8/m8.2/test-happy-path-yotzer.js` (regex now matches exact relative form `agents/<id>.md` instead of `.+\/agents\/<id>\.md`).
- 1 assertion adjusted in `tests/m8/m8.2/test-chief-fallback.js` (same).
- 4 new regression tests added at `tests/m8/m8.7/test-hotfix-persona-relative-path.js` to guard against future regression: NO-leak in entry, NO-leak in specialists, exact-form match, byte-equality across two cellRoots.

**Verification:**
- `tests/m6/test-channel-github-packages.js` → PASS (was FAIL).
- `tests/m6/test-channel-npx-github.js` → PASS (was FAIL).
- Full M6 + M7 + M8 suite → 1008/1008 PASS.

---

## 7. Decision

**Gate verdict:** **PASS**

**Rationale:** All 3 PRD § M8 gate criteria pass at the integration level:
- **Gate 1** (init produces 1+9 skills) — fully automated, 6 supporting tests.
- **Gate 2** (live `/Kaizen:Yotzer` activation) — structural prerequisite automated; runtime activation documented as reproducible manual procedure for `@qa`. The honest limitation is acknowledged in the story and in the smoke fixture: a Claude Code interactive session has no headless API.
- **Gate 3** (doctor detects missing skill) — fully automated, including the AVISO format with cell path AND fix suggestion in pt-BR.

The M6.7 §6.1 backlog item — the only outstanding CONCERN from the M6 close — is closed by the M8.7 hotfix. The channel-hash invariant is restored.

**Recommended actions:**
1. **@qa (Quinn) — gate sign-off:** execute the manual smoke procedure documented at `tests/m8/integration/smoke-procedure.md` once. Record verdict in `tests/m8/MANUAL-SMOKE-TEST.md`. After PASS, the M8 milestone is formally Done.
2. **@po (Pax) — milestone close:** approve M8 milestone close after @qa records the smoke verdict.
3. **@devops (Gage) — v1.5.0 GA tag:** push `v1.5.0` to trigger `publish.yml` once M8 is formally Done. The M6.7 §6.2 backlog item (init manifest copy) — a separate, pre-existing CONCERN unrelated to M8 — should be addressed before GA tag if not already merged in a parallel patch story.
4. **@pm (Morgan):** update `docs/kaizen/epics/epic-m8-yotzer-activation.md` Definition of Done section after the @qa smoke sign-off.
